analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet uses a proverb about resilience to express optimism that the world will recover from COVID-19 stronger than before. It is generic, global, and not China-specific. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not mentioned or implied. CH2 (China benevolent power): No reference to China’s international role, cooperation, or multilateralism. CH3 (China’s epic history): No historical reference to China or CCP-linked resilience; the proverb is universal and applied to the world. CH4 (appropriate political system/values): No mention of Chinese governance or values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No claim about China’s development or performance. CH6 (China culture/nature/heritage): While a proverb-style line is used, the tweet does not present Chinese culture explicitly or promote China as interesting; it’s framed as a global message. Conclusion: No listed narratives are promoted.
